trades.reasoning: Top screener score (100) with RSI in the ideal 55–70 momentum zone, confirmed volume surge, MACD bullish crossover, and price 4.7% above SMA-20 — best technical setup available today.
AI optical interconnect play with RSI at 61.9 leaving meaningful upside before overbought territory, MACD bullish crossover confirmed, and price 9% above SMA-20 on continued data center demand.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted mildly higher today — NASDAQ +0.4%, S&P +0.3% — with no major catalysts driving direction. The portfolio continues to outperform at +30% total return. With 4 open slots and $1,200+ in cash sitting idle, deploying into HCC (the highest-conviction screener pick) and AAOI (AI infrastructure theme with room to run before overbought) to put capital to work rather than holding cash in a neutral-positive tape.

market_education.summary_en: Equities posted quiet gains today as investors digested mixed signals — steady AI infrastructure spending continued to lift semiconductor and optical networking names, while broader macro uncertainty kept volume muted. Growth and tech stocks modestly outpaced value, reflecting ongoing rotation into AI-adjacent themes. The muted breadth suggests the market is consolidating recent gains rather than committing to a fresh directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日股市靜靜上揚，投資者消化著複雜訊號——AI基礎設施持續強勁帶動半導體與光網絡類股，但宏觀不確定性令整體成交量偏低。成長股與科技股表現略優於價值股，反映市場持續向AI相關主題輪動。整體市場廣度偏弱，顯示市場正在消化近期漲幅，而非啟動新一輪方向性行情。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing buys stocks showing strong recent price gains, rising volume, and bullish technical signals — betting those trends will persist in the near term. Today's top pick HCC exemplifies this: RSI in the 55–70 sweet spot (trending but not yet overbought), MACD bullish crossover, and a volume surge all confirm buyers are in control. The core risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, which is exactly why stop-losses are non-negotiable in this strategy.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略專門買入近期漲勢強勁、成交量放大、技術指標看漲的股票，押注這些趨勢在短期內仍將延續。今日頭號選股HCC正是典型範例：RSI處於55至70的黃金區間（趨勢確立但尚未過熱）、MACD看漲交叉、加上成交量激增，三者共同確認買盤主導格局。此策略的核心風險在於動能可能急速逆轉，這正是嚴守止損紀律不可妥協的原因。
